productDisplayName: Red Tape Men's Formal Slip-On Black Shoe
description: Take casual dressing to the next level with these leather slip-ons from red tape. Stylish to the hilt and an absolute comfort to the feet, it's a perfect addition to your wardrobe for those days at the lounge. Team this with chinos and simple shirts for that cool, casual look.Upper Rugged leather uppers for that stylish look and comfort feel Elasticated inserts on either side of the tongue for easy insertion and removal of the feet Rugged stitch detailing for style and durability Cushioned collar for greater comfort Textile lining for greater comfort Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Complete inner fabric lining for breathable comfort Fabric footbed for all-day comfort and sweat protection Brand name on the heel Outsole Durable rubber outsole with textured lugs along the medial side and toe region, with terraced lugs on the lateral side and pivot points on the forefoot and heel for maximum grip, traction and easy movement of the foot shoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shineDo not store in direct sunlight
